fields.title: Extract shared helpers: errorMessage, formatDuration, stripAnsi, model-id parsing
fields.description: DRY targets Gemini highlighted. Duplicates: errorMessage in control.ts and agent-registry.ts (identical), formatDuration in worked-for and status.ts (slightly different), stripAnsi in terminal-prompt and sandbox/approval.ts (different regexes), model-id parsing in prompt-modes.ts, model-spec.ts, worker.ts. Extract to shared/ modules.
fields.close_reason: Extracted errorMessage, formatDuration, stripAnsi, and model-id parsing to shared/ modules
